para1: is registered with the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) as a Non-Banking Financial Company Base Layer (NBFC-BL) under the Scale Based Regulation (SBR) framework and is primarily engaged in the business of Pay Day Loans, Loans Against Property (LAP), EMI-based Retail Loans and Corporate Business Loans.
paragraphs.para2: The purpose of this policy is to establish a harmonised framework for credit origination, risk control, portfolio diversification, liquidity stability and regulatory compliance in alignment with RBI Master Directions, circulars and prudential norms as amended from time to time.
paragraphs.para3: The Company recognises that Pay Day Loans constitute a major portion of its loan portfolio and therefore incorporates enhanced prudential safeguards, risk-based underwriting controls and strict concentration norms specific to this segment.

objectives.title: 2. Objectives of the Policy
objectives.description: The objectives of this policy are to:
items: Establish structured and standardised credit processes
Ensure prudent credit appraisal and responsible lending
Maintain optimal liquidity and solvency levels
Mitigate credit, operational and liquidity risks
Align portfolio strategy with risk appetite

philosophy.title: 3. Credit Philosophy
philosophy.description: The lending philosophy of the Company is based on responsible financial inclusion while maintaining asset quality and profitability. Lending decisions shall be guided by:
philosophy.footer: The Company aims to balance growth with sustainability, ensuring that credit expansion does not compromise financial stability.

payDay.title: 4.1 Pay Day Loans
payDay.description: Short-term unsecured loans extended to individuals for emergency or immediate cash requirements, generally repayable within 15 days to 6 months.

lap.title: 4.2 Loans Against Property (LAP)
lap.description: Secured loans against residential or commercial property for personal or business purposes.

emi.title: 4.3 EMI-Based Retail Loans
emi.description: Structured repayment loans for consumer purchase, education, medical and household needs.

corporate.title: 4.4 Corporate Business Loans
corporate.description: Working capital and term loans to corporates subject to strict appraisal norms.

eligibility.title: 5. Credit Eligibility Criteria
note: borrower assessment and shall not grant loans to blacklisted or high-risk profile individuals.

underwriting.title: 6. Credit Underwriting Process
items: Risk grading and scorecard based evaluation
underwriting.footer: Special due diligence shall apply for repeat borrowers and high-value loans.

title: 7. Credit Pricing
Interest Structure
pricing.description: Interest rates shall be determined based on:
regulatoryNote: shall be mandatorily disclosed as per RBI Digital Lending norms.

title: 8. Repayment
Monitoring
items: Continuous monitoring of EMI track record

definition.title: 9. Definition
definition.description: Credit concentration risk arises when exposure to a borrower, sector or geographic cluster becomes excessive.

title: 11. Product Concentration Limits
Management
concentration.strategy: While concentration limits reflect the existing business model and strategic focus of the Company, it is acknowledged that such high dependence on a single product category may increase portfolio vulnerability. Accordingly, the Company shall proactively undertake steps to progressively diversify its loan portfolio by expanding secured lending, retail EMI-based products and corporate business lending. Strategic initiatives shall include product innovation, targeted marketing, risk-adjusted pricing and gradual rebalancing of the portfolio to achieve a healthier and more sustainable credit mix over time.

partC.heading: PART C - LIQUIDITY RISK MANAGEMENT FRAMEWORK

alm.title: 13. ALM Structure
alm.footer: Time buckets as per RBI prescribed standards shall be followed strictly.

lcr.title: 15. LCR Framework
lcr.description: The Company shall maintain minimum LCR as per regulatory thresholds and maintain adequate HQLA.

breach.title: 18. Breach Management
breach.description: Immediate escalation to Board and corrective plan within 30 days.

review.title: 19. Policy Review
review.description: This policy shall be reviewed annually or earlier if regulatory changes warrant modification.

effectiveDate.title: Effective Date
description: This Policy shall come into effect from
and shall supersede all previous credit-related policies.

boardApproval.title: Board Approval
boardApproval.description: Approved by: Board of Directors, Satsai Finlease Private Limited
